anim8.description: A 2D animation library for LÖVE. Handles sprite sheets, frames, tags, and playback.

beehive.description: A behavior tree implementation in lua.

bitser.description: Serializes and deserializes Lua values with LuaJIT

bump.description: A Lua library for simple AABB collision detection and resolution.

cdata.description: Serialize Lua tables to C structs and strings.

classic.description: A tiny class module for Lua. Minimal OOP with inheritance.

feel.description: feedback recipe runner for making game actions feel better.

flexlove.description: A Löve Gui based on Flexbox

flux.description: A fast, lightweight tweening library for Lua with chainable API and easing functions.

g3d.description: Simple and easy 3D engine for LÖVE.

hump.description: Helper utilities for LÖVE: camera, timer, signal, class, vector, gamestate.

inspect.description: Human-readable table serializer and pretty-printer for Lua. Useful for debugging.

json.description: A lightweight JSON library for Lua

knife.description: A collection of useful micro-modules for Lua.

love-dialogue.description: Dialogue based Game Engine for Love2d with custom scripting language for dialogues

lovebpm.description: A LÖVE library for syncing events to the BPM of an audio track

lua-state-machine.description: A finite state machine lua micro framework

lume.description: A collection of Lua functions for gamedev: math, table manipulation, string utilities, and more.

middleclass.description: A simple OOP library for Lua. Supports inheritance, mixins, and interfaces.

push.description: Resolution-independence library for LÖVE. Lets you draw at a fixed resolution and scale to any window size.

ripple.description: Sound manager with tag support for LÖVE.

shove.description: A powerful resolution-handler and rendering library for LÖVE 📐

smiti18n.description: A very complete internationalization library for Lua with LÖVE support 🌕💕

sti.description: Simple Tiled Implementation — loads and renders Tiled maps (.tmx) in LÖVE.

tween.description: Tweening/Easing/Interpolating functions for lua. Inspired on jQuery's animate method.
